variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16631 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16631 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16631 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 11 103/2 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16631
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25539 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16631
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF25539 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
